description: Style NotePure police New york Women, for women, is available in a characteristic Pure Police flacon with statue of liberty symbol. Product DetailsThe edition for women allures with foamy accords of bergamot, currant leaves and buds and juicy pineapple aromas that open the composition. A heart is very sensual and feminine & ndash with aromas of mimosa and apples blossom joined with lotus to provide ultimate femininity. Base notes close with sensual musk mixed with vanilla and cedar, leaving a sweet and seductive trailCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize75 ml
